phrases.intent_en: How do I rent an audio guide
phrases.cultural_note: Audio guides are checked out at the same counter where tickets are purchased.

likely_response.local: Bij de balie met uw entreebewijs.
likely_response.translation_en: At the desk with your ticket.

responses.english: At the desk with your ticket.
responses.local: Bij de balie met uw entreebewijs.
